title: 利益冲突 / Conflict of Interest
summary: 代表利益与客户利益可能不一致即存在冲突;处理:客户优先,冲突应避免,不能避免则充分披露并管理。 / A conflict exists where a representative’s interests may diverge from the client’s; handle it by client-first, avoid the conflict, and if unavoidable disclose fully and manage it.

sections.heading: 什么是利益冲突
sections.body: 因薪酬、激励、关联关系等被诱导做出不以客户利益为先的建议(如高佣产品、销售竞赛)。

sections.heading: What is a conflict
sections.body: Where pay, incentives or relationships could induce advice that does not put the client’s interest first (e.g. high-commission products, sales contests).

sections.heading: 处理层级
sections.body: 优先避免;无法避免则向客户充分清晰披露;建立机制管理,确保建议仍以客户需求为先。

sections.heading: Handling hierarchy
sections.body: Avoid first; if unavoidable, disclose fully and clearly; manage via controls so advice still serves the client.

keyPoints: 客户利益优先 / Client interest first
冲突先避免,不能避免则披露并管理 / Avoid; else disclose and manage
高佣金不等于可推荐不适合产品 / High commission ≠ recommend unsuitable products
